prompt: Recolor the creature in the source image to match the color palette of the reference image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the source image displaying a detailed creature, by recoloring only this creature. The new colors of the creature should precisely adopt the full color palette from image 2, the reference image. This includes the prominent yellow and black tones from the fish, as well as the vibrant green hues from the aquatic environment shown in image 2. The final edited image must be photorealistic.
